title: biscutella longifolia subsp. kerneri
intro: Biscutella longifolia subsp. kerneri, also known as Kern's biscutella, is a subspecies of the Biscutella longifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Kern's biscutella has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
